query:
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S8JR3KM' LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT 
  bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount,
  bi.customerExternalId,
  COUNT(sba.serviceExternalId) as assignedServices
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.customerExternalId = (
  SELECT customerExternalId FROM services WHERE externalId = 'S8JR3KM' LIMIT 1
)
GROUP BY bi.externalId, bi.description, bi.lineAmount, bi.quantity, bi.unitAmount, bi.customerExternalId
ORDER BY bi.lineAmount DESC;
